caption: A person's hand is shown working on a craft project atop a white gridded cutting mat. The scene includes several pieces of patterned paper with nature-inspired designs in greens, yellows, and blues. A blue patterned card sits to the left, while a shorter strip of green patterned paper lies flat on the mat. To the right, a black ink pad is visible. The person's right hand, with light-colored nail polish, holds a long strip of the green patterned paper, sliding it vertically across the mat. In the background, a clear acrylic ruler and a small tag with the text "best wishes" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves the long strip of paper slightly downward and adjusts its position on the cutting mat. A faint watermark that reads "Stamping Lily" is visible in the lower left area of the frames.
